title: gentiana sumatrana var. humifusa
intro: Gentiana sumatrana var. humifusa, also known as the Sumatran gentian, is a rare and endangered variety of the Gentiana sumatrana plant, native to the mountainous regions of Sumatra in Indonesia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of iridoid glycosides, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Gentiana sumatrana var. humifusa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and improve digestion, making it a sought-after herb in traditional medicine. Gentiana sumatrana var. humifusa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
